_comment_soru: --- Soru Soru no Mi ability names ---
_comment_soru_desc: --- Soru Soru no Mi ability descriptions ---
_comment_uo_uo: --- Uo Uo no Mi ability names ---
_comment_uo_uo_desc: --- Uo Uo no Mi ability descriptions ---
ability.peteraddon.andon.description: Generates flames into the fist and launches them at enemies. Requires Flame On (1 stack).
ability.peteraddon.bolo_breath.descripti: After a brief charge, releases a massive draconic energy blast. Damage is doubled when Kaen Daiko is active.
ability.peteraddon.flame_off.description: Turns flames off for a burst of speed, jump height, and attack speed. Negates fall damage.
ability.peteraddon.flame_on.description: The user turns their flames on, increasing damage and defense. Reduces stacks when hit.
ability.peteraddon.flame_rush.descriptio: Propels the user forward with fire. Shorter distance while Flame On is active.
ability.peteraddon.flaming_slash.descrip: Fires a flaming air slash from the user's weapon. Requires Flame On (1 stack).
ability.peteraddon.hababa.description.0: Leap and crash down with devastating force using Prometheus. Requires Napoleon and active Prometheus.
ability.peteraddon.heavenly_bonbon.descr: Prometheus fires a rapid burst of fire bullets from the user's fingertips.
ability.peteraddon.ikoku.description.0: Napoleon fires a powerful haki-infused slash at the enemy. Requires Napoleon in the main hand.
ability.peteraddon.indra.description.0: Zeus fires a devastating lightning strike at the targeted enemy.
ability.peteraddon.infernal_gale.descrip: Conjures a vortex of white Lunarian flames that pulls nearby enemies into its core, incinerating all in its path. Requires Flame On (2 stacks).
ability.peteraddon.kaen_daiko.descriptio: Only usable in full Dragon Form. Engulfs the user in draconic flames, burning and damaging all nearby enemies each tick.
ability.peteraddon.kaen_rakka.descriptio: While airborne, the user gathers spiraling Lunarian flames, then crashes into the ground releasing a massive fire shockwave. Requires Flame On (2 stacks).
ability.peteraddon.kaifu.description.0: Fires continuous wind slashes with great range, capable of cutting through both enemies and blocks.
ability.peteraddon.karyudon.description: Fires a flaming dragon at opponents. Requires Flame On (1 stack).
ability.peteraddon.lunarian_slow_fall.de: Passive. Grants Slow Falling when not crouching.
ability.peteraddon.marma_raid.descriptio: Channel Zeus to launch skyward and slam down with thunderous force. Requires Napoleon and active Zeus.
Fires a combined Zeus-Prometheus blast: an electric fireball that explodes on impact.
ability.peteraddon.omori_karyudon.descri: Launches into the air while firing multiple fire dragons at opponents. Requires Flame On (3 stacks).
ability.peteraddon.prometheus_flamethrow: Prometheus unleashes a blazing stream of fire, scorching everything in its path.
ability.peteraddon.raitei.description.0: Focuses a cluster of electricity above the target, then rains down a powerful lightning bolt from the sky.
ability.peteraddon.soul_pocus.descriptio: Strike an enemy barehanded to steal their soul. Stolen souls fuel other Soru Soru abilities.
ability.peteraddon.soul_recover.descript: Uses soul flames to heal allied entities. Crouch to heal in area, or strike an ally to heal them. Costs 3 souls.
ability.peteraddon.soul_shave.descriptio: Gradually absorbs stored souls to grow in size and power. Each soul increases stats. Max 30 souls.
ability.peteraddon.special_homie_napoleo: Invests 10 souls to summon Napoleon, a living sword homie. Equips Napoleon for powerful slashing attacks.
ability.peteraddon.special_homie_prometh: Invests 10 souls to summon Prometheus, a living sun homie. Prometheus engulfs enemies in flames.
ability.peteraddon.special_homie_zeus.de: Invests 10 souls to summon Zeus, a living thundercloud homie. Zeus attacks enemies and can be ridden.
ability.peteraddon.stollen_feuer.descrip: Prometheus rains down massive fireballs from the sky onto the enemies below.
ability.peteraddon.tatsumaki.description: Only usable in full Dragon Form. Summons 4 draconic wind tornadoes that pull in and damage nearby enemies.
ability.peteraddon.tenman_daijizai_tenji: Zeus summons a storm of electrical balls that rain down on enemies from above.
ability.peteraddon.testtt.description.0: Transforms into a humanoid dragon hybrid. Greatly boosts strength, armor, max health, reach and step height.
ability.peteraddon.uo_uo_flight.descript: Passive · Grants sustained flight while the Dragon Form is active.
ability.peteraddon.uo_uo_rideable.descri: Passive · Allows other players to ride the user while in Dragon Form.
ability.peteraddon.uo_uo_ryuo.descriptio: Transforms into Kaido's mythical Azure Dragon (Seiryu). Massively boosts attack, armor and range.
Requires being at least 50 blocks above the ground to transform.
item.peteraddon.uo_uo_no_mi_model_dragon: Uo Uo no Mi, Model: Dragon
